# QualityDeath / Sage

> Your story matters. AI-guided end-of-life planning that turns difficult conversations into structured care plans and lasting legacies.

## What we do
QualityDeath provides guided conversations about end-of-life wishes, values exploration, advance directive creation, and family sharing. Sage AI facilitates conversations at your pace — emotional support, structured planning, and community stories from others who have walked this path.

## Links
- Website: https://qualitydeath.com
- CareGoals: https://caregoals.com
- co-op.care: https://co-op.care
